# CWE-1052 negative: DSN from environment (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-1052-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

// CWE-1052 mitigated: database connection string read from APP_DATABASE_URL.

import (
	"database/sql"
	"net/http"
	"os"
)

func OpenAppDBSafePure() (*sql.DB, error) {
	dsn := os.Getenv("APP_DATABASE_URL")
	if dsn == "" {
		return nil, os.ErrInvalid
	}
	return sql.Open("postgres", dsn)
}

func HealthWithDBSafePure() http.HandlerFunc {
	db, err := OpenAppDBSafePure()
	return func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		if err != nil || db == nil {
			http.Error(w, `{"db":"down"}`, http.StatusServiceUnavailable)
			return
		}
		if err := db.Ping(); err != nil {
			http.Error(w, `{"db":"down"}`, http.StatusServiceUnavailable)
			return
		}
		w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
		w.Write([]byte(`{"db":"up"}`))
	}
}
